name: Trailing Prayer Artificial Plant - Room Essentials™
description:
Transform your home or office without the need for maintenance with this Trailing Prayer Artificial Plant from Room Essentials™. This artificial arrangement features a realistic-looking lush green trailing prayer plant, and it comes housed in a long, white melamine pot with styrofoam filler for instant display. Place it on a side or console table with other real or faux plants to create a relaxing indoor garden.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
